test.name: Gleneagles DIY SkipNxtBinding SkipEIMBinding skip ISU Configure WIFI - #1

kw.name: Given : user launches and logs in to the "Resideo Pro" app
kw.msg: [FAIL - False Positive] Instantiate Driver : Error occured. Error message - Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Error executing adbExec. Original error: 'Command '/Users/sushmithaangadi/Library/Android/sdk/platform-tools/adb -P 5037 -s 51281VDAQ0001W install /Users/sushmithaangadi/air-svt-automation/src/test/resources/MobileAPP/resideoPro.apk' exited with code 1'; Command output: adb: failed to install /Users/sushmithaangadi/air-svt-automation/src/test/resources/MobileAPP/resideoPro.apk: Failure [INSTALL_FAILED_MISSING_SPLIT: Missing split for com.resideo.rezi_pro] Host info: host: 'IE6CC5H26YWR3W', ip: 'fd79:a83a:d775:6793:60:c226:6108:ee1f%en0' Build info: version: '4.27.0', revision: 'd6e718d134' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', os.version: '15.6.1', java.version: '25.0.2' Driver info: com.resideo.commons.mobile.CustomAndroidDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {appium:androidInstallTimeout: 90000, appium:app: /Users/sushmithaangadi/air-..., appium:appActivity: com.resideo.rezi_pro.MainAc..., appium:appPackage: com.resideo.wick, appium:appWaitActivity: com.resideo.rezi_pro.MainAc..., appium:appWaitPackage: com.resideo.wick, appium:autoLaunch: false, appium:automationName: uiautomator2, appium:commandTimeout: 30000, appium:deviceName: 09281FDD4S00K2, appium:fullReset: false, appium:idleTimeout: 10000, appium:name: Gleneagles DIY SkipNxtBindi..., appium:newCommandTimeout: 300000, appium:noReset: true, appium:optionalIntentArguments: --ez LyricUIAutomation true, appium:shouldTerminateApp: true, browserName: , platformName: ANDROID}]}] Capabilities {appium:androidInstallTimeout: 90000, appium:app: /Users/sushmithaangadi/air-..., appium:appActivity: com.resideo.rezi_pro.MainAc..., appium:appPackage: com.resideo.wick, appium:appWaitActivity: com.resideo.rezi_pro.MainAc..., appium:appWaitPackage: com.resideo.wick, appium:autoLaunch: false, appium:automationName: uiautomator2, appium:commandTimeout: 30000, appium:deviceName: 09281FDD4S00K2, appium:fullReset: false, appium:idleTimeout: 10000, appium:name: Gleneagles DIY SkipNxtBindi..., appium:newCommandTimeout: 300000, appium:noReset: true, appium:optionalIntentArguments: --ez LyricUIAutomation true, appium:shouldTerminateApp: true, browserName: , platformName: ANDROID}
[FAIL - False Positive] Not able to launch the resideo pro app

test.doc:
Instantiate Driver : Error occured. Error message - Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Error executing adbExec. Original error: 'Command '/Users/sushmithaangadi/Library/Android/sdk/platform-tools/adb -P 5037 -s 51281VDAQ0001W install /Users/sushmithaangadi/air-svt-automation/src/test/resources/MobileAPP/resideoPro.apk' exited with code 1'; Command output: adb: failed to install /Users/sushmithaangadi/air-svt-automation/src/test/resources/MobileAPP/resideoPro.apk: Failure [INSTALL_FAILED_MISSING_SPLIT: Missing split for com.resideo.rezi_pro]
